# ProCabinet.App

> The workshop OS for cabinet makers. Set your rates once, then quote, cut,
> schedule and bill from one place — cabinet quoting, cut lists with sheet
> nesting and DXF export, cabinet and stock libraries, job scheduling, and
> live customer quote links with e-sign and deposit payments. Web app, no
> install. Free to start.

Key facts:

- Built by Adam Denney, a cabinet maker who ran his own cabinetry workshop
  for over 10 years.
- Pricing (USD, checkout bills in your local currency): Free $0 forever ·
  Pro Monthly $35/mo list (launch price $25/mo for the first 6 months) ·
  Pro Annual $299/yr list (launch price $180 billed for year one) ·
  Founder Lifetime $299 one-off, only 50 seats ever sold.
- Every account starts with a 14-day Pro trial, no card required.
- The free plan keeps all core functions: unlimited stock items and 5 saved
  items per other library (clients, cabinets, quotes, orders, cut lists).
- The cut list optimiser respects grain direction and kerf, nests parts for
  minimum sheet waste, and exports a standard DXF that opens in any CAM
  software (Vectric, Fusion 360, AlphaCAM, Cabinet Vision).
- Works in both metric and imperial.
- Customers view, adjust options, sign and pay a deposit on quotes through
  one live link — no account, portal or app download needed.
- Integrates with QuickBooks Online and Xero (invoice push) and Stripe
  (customer payments).

## Pages

- [Home — features, pricing, FAQ](https://procabinet.app/)
- [How payment fees work](https://procabinet.app/payment-fees)
